sentences.arabic: التَّوَكُّلُ عَلَى اللَّهِ هُوَ اعْتِمَادُ الْقَلْبِ عَلَى اللَّهِ مَعَ الْأَخْذِ بِالْأَسْبَابِ الْمُمْكِنَةِ.
sentences.translation: Tevvekul (pouzdanje u Allaha) je oslanjanje srca na Allaha uz poduzimanje mogućih uzroka.
sentences.translationEn: Tawakkul (reliance on Allah) is the heart's dependence on Allah while taking possible means.

sentences.arabic: يَقُولُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ إِنَّ التَّوَكُّلَ الصَّحِيحَ لَا يَعْنِي تَرْكَ الْعَمَلِ أَبَدًا.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin, Allah mu se smilovao, kaže da ispravan tevekkul nikako ne znači ostavljanje rada.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen, may Allah have mercy on him, says that correct reliance never means abandoning work.

sentences.arabic: بَلْ يَجِبُ عَلَى الْمُسْلِمِ أَنْ يَجْتَهِدَ فِي طَلَبِ الرِّزْقِ ثُمَّ يَثِقَ بِأَنَّ الْخَيْرَ مِنَ اللَّهِ.
sentences.translation: Naprotiv, musliman se mora truditi u traženju opskrbe, a zatim vjerovati da dobro dolazi samo od Allaha.
sentences.translationEn: Rather, a Muslim must strive in seeking sustenance and then trust that goodness comes from Allah alone.

sentences.arabic: عِنْدَمَا نَتَوَكَّلُ عَلَى اللَّهِ حَقَّ التَّوَكُّلِ، نَشْعُرُ بِالْأَمَانِ فِي حَيَاتِنَا.
sentences.translation: Kada se istinski pouzdamo u Allaha, osjećamo sigurnost u svom životu.
sentences.translationEn: When we truly rely on Allah, we feel security in our lives.

sentences.arabic: هَذَا التَّوَازُنُ بَيْنَ السَّعْيِ وَالثِّقَةِ هُوَ جَوْهَرُ الْعَقِيدَةِ السَّلِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ova ravnoteža između truda i povjerenja je suština ispravnog vjerovanja.
sentences.translationEn: This balance between striving and trust is the essence of sound creed.
